title: Competing Values Framework Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Competing Values Framework skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

cvf_culture_survey.description: CVF culture survey responses from a representative sample of leadership and employees (minimum 20 respondents for reliable scoring)

organizational_context_industry.description: Organizational context: industry, size, strategic priorities, and current performance challenges

defined_desired_future.description: Defined desired future state or strategic ambition against which to assess cultural fit

segmentation_data_enable.description: Segmentation data to enable analysis by level, function, or business unit if required

prior_cvf_ocai.description: Prior CVF or OCAI assessment results for longitudinal comparison

competitive_benchmarks_industry.description: Competitive benchmarks or industry culture norms for external reference

leadership_team_facilitated.description: Leadership team facilitated discussion outputs on values and desired behaviors
